title: prunus × dunbarii
intro: Prunus × dunbarii, also known as Dunbar's cherry, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a hybrid of Prunus avium and Prunus cerasus. The medicinal properties of Prunus × dunbarii are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have antimicrobial properties. Prunus × dunbarii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
